A

Allows for the building to accept the visitor, like inspection

Allows for the building to accept the visitor, like inspection

B

Building - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Composite
Represents Building as a CompositeLocation from Composite Design Pattern Contains multiple Levels as a children

Default constructor
BuildingInfoApplication - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.app
Main application entry point for the Building Info REST API.
BuildingInfoApplication() - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.app.BuildingInfoApplication
 
BuildingInfoController - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest
REST Controller that provides an interface for managing and querying building information.
BuildingInfoController(ControllerHelper) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Constructor for helper which store all needed functions for computations This Constructor is used by Spring and is triggered when applications starts

Recursively searches for a specific location within the building hierarchy.

Traverses the building to identify rooms exceeding the heating threshold.

Formats a list of rooms into a readable report string using StringBuilder.

getResult() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.AreaVisitor
Returns total area of the visited rooms
getResult() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.CubatureVisitor
Returns total cubature of the visited rooms
getResult() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.HeatingVisitor
Calculates heating energy consumption per unit of volume for a given location
getResult() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.LightingVisitor
Calculates lighting power per unit area for a given location
getResult() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.Visitor
Retrieves final calculated result across all triggered objects

Visitor - Interface in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor
Defines an operation to be performed on the elements of Room.
visitorHandler(String, Location) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.ControllerHelper
Factory method that creates the appropriate Visitor for a metric and triggers the visit operation on a location.
visitRoom(Room) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.AreaVisitor
Adds area of a given room to the total area
visitRoom(Room) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.CubatureVisitor
Adds cubatures of a given room to the total cubature
visitRoom(Room) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.HeatingVisitor
Adds area of a given room to the total area Adds heating level of a visited room to the total heating consumption
visitRoom(Room) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.LightingVisitor
Adds area of a given room to the total area Adds lighting power of a given room to the total lighting power
visitRoom(Room) - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Visitor.Visitor
Performs the visitor's specific logic on Room instance
